Keywords.Label: Damage Keywords
Keywords.Hint: Comma-separated keywords attached to damage from this item. Used by damage effects on targets to determine resistances and vulnerabilities.

Keyword.Label: Keyword(s)
Keyword.Hint: Space-separate keywords that must ALL be present, or use | for OR logic. Prefix with ! to match when the keyword is absent. Leave blank to match any damage.

Value.Label: Value
Value.Hint: For ×: use 0 = immune, 0.5 = half, 2 = double. For +: use positive or negative number.

Priority.Label: Priority
Priority.Hint: Higher number = evaluated first. Normally leave at 0; raise only if you need a specific effect to win over the default least-damage rule.

PromptMode.Name: Damage Prompt Mode
PromptMode.Hint: When a damage roll matches a keyword effect, how should the GM be notified?
PromptMode.Auto: Automatic — prompt appears immediately on the chat card
PromptMode.Manual: Manual — a button appears on the chat card; GM clicks to evaluate

PlayerVisible.Name: Show Prompts to Players
PlayerVisible.Hint: If enabled, damage effect prompts are visible to players as well as the GM. If disabled, only the GM sees them.

Prompt.Title: Damage Effects
Prompt.NoTarget: No targeted tokens — select or target a token first.
